name: join-pane-to-window
description: Move the focused pane into another tmux window

name: move-window-to-session
description: Move the current window into another tmux session

name: kill-session
description: Kill another tmux session, with confirmation

name: break-pane
description: Break the current pane into its own window

name: pick-pane
description: Jump to any pane across all sessions

name: pick-window
description: Jump to any window across all sessions

name: w-window
description: Append windows from a tmuxp workspace to the current session

name: w-session
description: Create a new session from a tmuxp workspace

name: w-detach
description: Create a new session from a tmuxp workspace without attaching
